problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
